activities.title: Blueprint — Business Model + Revenue Model
instructions: Open Venture Blueprint in the Playbook
Update Business Model: client sources, solutions, value delivery
Update Revenue Model: income today and five-year growth path
Integrate AIA Platform into both sections — not a product list
debriefQuestions: How does the platform change how your business earns income?

activities.title: FEC — Platform Integration Workshop
instructions: Review Week 3 foundation — do not erase Customers, Problems, Solutions, Value Proposition
Complete Platform Integration: how venture operates on AIA Platform
Complete Revenue Engine: how business generates and maximizes income
Complete Agency Growth Strategy: team and systems that scale the enterprise
debriefQuestions: What stayed the same from Week 3? What evolved today?

activities.title: Squad Platform Integration Share
instructions: Each squad shares one sentence: how platform integration changes their venture
Program coach synthesizes themes across squads
debriefQuestions: Which squad articulated the strongest platform connection?
